method: HTML runtime marker inspection plus CDN/path validation. Full gameplay still requires browser playthrough because HTML5 games do not expose a universal headless pass/fail API.

rows.title: Candy Crush HTML5
rows.notes: Archived but not public because jsDelivr serves HTML files as text/plain with nosniff; move to GitHub Pages, R2, or Vercel static hosting for playable iframe delivery.

rows.title: Retro Highway
rows.notes: Archived but not public because jsDelivr serves HTML files as text/plain with nosniff; move to GitHub Pages, R2, or Vercel static hosting for playable iframe delivery.

rows.title: Subway Surfers San Francisco
rows.notes: Large single-file HTML bundle. It is preserved unchanged to avoid breaking embedded asset loading. It is archived but not public because jsDelivr serves HTML files as text/plain with nosniff and rejects this bundle with 403.
